docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALEANO, ANA ISABEL LICONA AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, CONSTANZA ORTIZ , AN INDIVDUAL DBA MAITE CATERING AND EVENTS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
